sections.paragraph: γραώδης, ες [γραύς ‘old/elderly woman’ + -ωδης; cp. γέρων] characteristic of an old women, γρ. μῦϑοι stories that old women love to tell 1 Ti 4:7. In satirical description of pers. who engage in fanciful interpretation and talk like old women who spend their time exchanging stories.
